quotes.text: The sun is a daily reminder that we too can rise.
quotes.author: Inspira Ink

quotes.text: Joy is not in things; it is in us.
quotes.author: Inspira Ink

quotes.text: Tears come from the heart and not from the brain.
quotes.author: Inspira Ink

quotes.text: Heavy hearts, like heavy clouds in the sky, are best relieved by the letting of a little water.
quotes.author: Inspira Ink

quotes.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
quotes.author: Inspira Ink

quotes.text: Whatever the mind can conceive and believe, it can achieve.
quotes.author: Inspira Ink

quotes.text: For every minute you remain angry, you give up sixty seconds of peace of mind.
quotes.author: Inspira Ink

quotes.text: Anger is an acid that can do more harm to the vessel in which it is stored.
quotes.author: Inspira Ink

quotes.text: Peace comes from within. Do not seek it without.
quotes.author: Inspira Ink

quotes.text: Calmness is the cradle of power.
quotes.author: Inspira Ink

quotes.text: Nothing diminishes anxiety faster than action.
quotes.author: Inspira Ink

quotes.text: Anxiety's like a rocking chair. It gives you something to do but doesn't get you anywhere.
quotes.author: Inspira Ink

quotes.text: Love is composed of a single soul inhabiting two bodies.
quotes.author: Inspira Ink

quotes.text: To love and be loved is to feel the sun from both sides.
quotes.author: Inspira Ink
